action.reasoning: Observation: current best hidden-test LPIPS is 0.3385 from cam_unet_v3. The attempted fine-tune failed only because local smoke test tried to load a checkpoint path that was never written, while training itself reported a saved best path. Analysis: this is a bookkeeping bug, not a modeling issue. With 16 iterations and >7h left, the highest-value move is to fix train.py checkpoint saving/resume logic and predict.py robustness, then run a short resumed fine-tune from cam_unet_v3 at lower LR and immediately evaluate the resulting checkpoint. Decision: patch train.py to always save both best and last checkpoints atomically, patch predict.py loading if needed, run 8-epoch fine-tune from cam_unet_v3 into cam_unet_v4.pt, smoke test locally, and submit if successful.
action.command: python train.py --data_root /data --output checkpoints/cam_unet_v4.pt --resume checkpoints/cam_unet_v3.pt --epochs 8 --lr 8e-5 --batch_size 16 --image_size 128 --base 80 --cond_dim 48 --edge_weight 0.06 --lpips_weight 0.12 && python predict.py --data_path /data/val --checkpoint checkpoints/cam_unet_v4.pt --output local_cam_v4_val_predictions.json
